ancestry.note: run sha is a descendant of the stamped commit

conventions.attribution_scope: verdict-gating attribution over significant lags in the [p10,p90] sensitivity window; full-curve unattributed lags disclosed non-gating
conventions.bin_rule: median replenishment latency, one significant figure
conventions.warmup_trim: bins starting before header steady_state.warmup_cutoff_s dropped
conventions.window_rule: [p25,p75] of replenishment latency, min 3 bins, min lag 1
